title: charpentiera ovata var. ovata
intro: Charpentiera ovata var. ovata, also known as the oval charpentiera, is a plant species that belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. It is a shrub native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in the Hawaiian Islands. The medicinal properties of Charpentiera ovata var. ovata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing skin irritations, with herbal preparations such as tea and infusions being commonly used for medicinal purposes.
